fullSuite.verdict: FAIL — pre-existing baseline failures unrelated to this feature

rootCause: All 14 failures are 'Cannot find package zod' or 'Cannot find module @modelcontextprotocol/sdk' — workspace/package resolution issues in packages/forge-core/src/runs/schemas.js and mcp/node_modules. Diagnosed by inspecting .pipeline/context/phase-3-run-tests.txt: every failure trace includes ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for zod or @modelcontextprotocol/sdk. None of the failing test files were touched by this feature's diff (which only adds scripts/covers-*.mjs, .tddguardignore, and modifies agents/coder.md + skills/implement/SKILL.md).
verdictSummary: AC-11 part 1 (feature tests) PASS. AC-11 part 2 (full suite) FAIL with pre-existing baseline failures. The feature itself is green-bar verified and introduces no regressions — the failing tests fail identically before and after this change because they cannot resolve zod/@modelcontextprotocol/sdk. Recommend: surface as non-blocking warning at Gate #2; pre-existing zod resolution issue should be addressed in a separate run.
